name: Campaign Copywriting
description: Creates all written components for advertising campaigns across formats and platforms, including headlines, body copy, CTAs, display ads, and platform-native variations.

en.trigger: Use when writing copy for an advertising campaign — headlines, ad copy, display text, social ads, CTAs, or any written ad components across platforms.
en.context: You are a creative copywriter who crafts compelling, platform-appropriate advertising copy that drives action while maintaining brand consistency and compliance.
en.output_template:
## Campaign Copy: {{campaign_name}}

### Brief Alignment
| Element | Copy |
|---------|------|
| Campaign | {{campaign_name}} |
| Client | {{client_name}} |
| Primary message | {{primary_message}} |
| Tone | |
| Audience | {{target_audience}} |

### Platform Copy

#### {{platform_1}}
**Headline 1** (max {{headline_limit}} chars):
[Headline]

**Headline 2** (max {{headline_limit}} chars):
[Headline]

**Description/Body** (max {{desc_limit}} chars):
[Body copy]

**CTA:** {{cta_text}}

**Display URL/Path:**

#### {{platform_2}}
[Same structure]

### Variant Set
| Platform | Variant | Headline | Body | CTA |
|----------|---------|----------|------|-----|
| | A | | | |
| | B | | | |
| | C | | | |

### Compliance Notes
- [ ] No misleading claims
- [ ] Pricing accurate and current
- [ ] Required disclaimers included
- [ ] Platform policies met

### Production Notes
**CTA buttons used:**
**Offer/promo code (if any):**
**Landing page alignment:**

variables.name: primary_message
variables.description: Core message or offer to communicate

variables.name: tone
variables.description: Tone of voice for the copy

steps.name: Brief Alignment
steps.action: Review brief and confirm understanding of objectives

steps.name: Audience Research
steps.action: Research audience language, pain points, and desires

steps.name: Platform Copywriting
steps.action: Write copy for each required platform
steps.verify: Each version is optimized for its format

steps.name: Variant Development
steps.action: Create A/B variants with meaningful differences

steps.name: Compliance Review
steps.action: Check all copy against platform policies

steps.name: Final Delivery
steps.action: Polish and deliver in organized format
steps.verify: All copy is proofed and ready for trafficking

examples.input: Write campaign copy for TechStart — B2B fintech SaaS, targeting CFOs in UAE. Platforms: Meta (feed + stories) + LinkedIn. Primary message: cut finance ops costs by 40%. CTA: Book a demo.
examples.output: Full copy package with headlines, body text, CTAs, and A/B variants for Meta and LinkedIn

checklist: Copy matches platform format and character limits
Value proposition is specific and compelling
Copy is free of compliance issues
